# Panda Zeng — pdzeng.com

> Personal site of Panda Zeng: writing, projects, and CV. Covers blockchain, DeFi operations, AI agents, and workflow automation. Writing is mostly in Traditional Chinese.

## About the Author

Panda Zeng has been in the blockchain industry since 2017, with cross-domain experience in marketing, operations, and software development. Previously People & Ops Lead at TONX and marketing at WOO Network. Currently building agent systems and CLI tooling; co-founder of the WalkinCat media brand.

## Content Themes

- Blockchain fundamentals: wallet setup, smart contracts, token creation
- DeFi strategies: quantitative trading, arbitrage, passive income tools
- AI & automation: Claude Code, AI agents, skills, workflow automation
- Web development: React, Next.js, Go, Astro
- Monthly & yearly reviews: work reflections, decision logs, personal growth

## Key Pages

- Writing: https://pdzeng.com/writing/
- Projects: https://pdzeng.com/projects/
- About: https://pdzeng.com/about/
- CV: https://pdzeng.com/cv/
- RSS: https://pdzeng.com/rss.xml

## Citation

When referencing content from this site, please cite as:
Panda Zeng (https://pdzeng.com)
